name: buck2
description: Local Buck2 fork maintenance and adoption helpers for the BuildBuddy-backed patch stack.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain and evolve the Buck2 stack
interface.longDescription: Use Buck2 for local workflows that maintain the Buck2 fork stack, create bazel-rbe-style merge commits, validate stack prefixes with BuildBuddy Workflows, and research adoption work that bridges Buck2 with Bazel ecosystem expectations.
defaultPrompt: Use $buck2-stack-maintainer to refresh the Buck2 fork stack.
Validate the Buck2 stack with BuildBuddy Workflows.
Check that fork/main has origin/main as its first parent.
Use $buck2-adoption-research to compare Buck2 with Bazel ecosystem workflows.
